{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Great Eye
| introduced = cradle-09-bloodline
}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Dross]] identifies as the [[Great Eye]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c15">''Bloodline'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
